Delayed in Atlanta on my way home (what else is new?)…

items.title: Sparks were outscored 8-2 in final 30 seconds of quarters today. Asked Lynne Roberts what has plagued them in those settings: “That’s a good question. I think it comes down to the—it’s the thinking while you’re playing, the execution piece. We’ve seemed to struggle with that.”
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Sparks were outscored 8-2 in final 30 seconds of quarters today. Asked Lynne Roberts what has plagued them in those settings: “That’s a good question. I think it comes down to the—it’s the thinking while you’re playing, the execution piece. We’ve seemed to struggle with that.”

items.title: On the surface, losing close games on the road to Atlanta, Minnesota, and Dallas while being without Kelsey Plum is not the end of the world. Those teams are a combined 26-11 at home this season. But 10-15 is 10-15, after all. And the Sparks desperately need to turn this around.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: On the surface, losing close games on the road to Atlanta, Minnesota, and Dallas while being without Kelsey Plum is not the end of the world. Those teams are a combined 26-11 at home this season. But 10-15 is 10-15, after all. And the Sparks desperately need to turn this around.

items.title: Final: Wings 90, Sparks 82. Los Angeles fought hard, but it was not meant to be. Nneka Ogwumike had 17 points and 10 rebounds. They go winless on this 4-in-7 road trip, dropping to 10-15. They’re 3-10 without Kelsey Plum. Sparks head home to play Phoenix on Wednesday.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Wings 90, Sparks 82. Los Angeles fought hard, but it was not meant to be. Nneka Ogwumike had 17 points and 10 rebounds. They go winless on this 4-in-7 road trip, dropping to 10-15. They’re 3-10 without Kelsey Plum. Sparks head home to play Phoenix on Wednesday.

items.title: Nneka Ogwumike and Paige Bueckers collided near the free-throw line and remained down for a considerable amount of time with both teams surrounding them. It looked like Bueckers took a hit to the right knee while Ogwumike’s already wrapped left hand slammed the floor.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Nneka Ogwumike and Paige Bueckers collided near the free-throw line and remained down for a considerable amount of time with both teams surrounding them. It looked like Bueckers took a hit to the right knee while Ogwumike’s already wrapped left hand slammed the floor.

items.title: Sparks have actually made more shots than the Wings have (25-24), but Dallas holds an edge in points off 3s (18-9) and made free throws (14-10). It’s more than made up for the disparity in paint points (40-30 in favor of the Sparks).
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Sparks have actually made more shots than the Wings have (25-24), but Dallas holds an edge in points off 3s (18-9) and made free throws (14-10). It’s more than made up for the disparity in paint points (40-30 in favor of the Sparks).

items.title: The Sparks trail 68-63 at the end of the third. LA took control for a moment, but Dallas went on a run late and regained momentum.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: The Sparks trail 68-63 at the end of the third. LA took control for a moment, but Dallas went on a run late and regained momentum.

items.title: End Q3 | Wings 68, Sparks 63 | Los Angeles took a brief lead, but Dallas stormed back to end the quarter. Sparks are dealing with foul trouble, but they’ve hung tough all day. Nneka Ogwumike leads with 13 points and 10 rebounds. Sparks are 3-for-14 on 3s.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: End Q3 | Wings 68, Sparks 63 | Los Angeles took a brief lead, but Dallas stormed back to end the quarter. Sparks are dealing with foul trouble, but they’ve hung tough all day. Nneka Ogwumike leads with 13 points and 10 rebounds. Sparks are 3-for-14 on 3s.
